# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-destination
  ports:
  - port: 8086
    targetPort: 8086
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-api
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-proxy-api
  ports:
  - port: 4191
    targetPort: 4191
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-web
  ports:
  - port: 8084
    targetPort: 8084
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: http
  bind: 0.0.0.0
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: my-service-server
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      user: "service-account"
  - authenticated:
      user: "cluster.local/ns/default/sa/other-service"
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-service-server
  namespace: auth
spec:
  port: 8080
  protocol: http
  bind: 0.0.0.0
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: auth-service-policy
  namespace: auth
spec:
  server:
    name: auth-service-server
  rules:
  - authenticated:
      user: "service-account"
  - authenticated:
      user: "cluster.local/ns/auth/sa/auth-service"
